sections.title: Part 2: Question-Response
sections.description: Listen to a question and 3 possible responses. Choose the best response.

questions.text: Where should I submit the quarterly report?
questions.explanation: Câu hỏi "Where" yêu cầu nơi chốn. Đáp án A nêu rõ địa điểm.

questions.text: Who is responsible for the marketing budget?
questions.explanation: Câu hỏi "Who" yêu cầu người. Đáp án B nêu người phụ trách.

questions.text: How often are performance reviews conducted?
questions.explanation: Câu hỏi "How often" yêu cầu tần suất.

questions.text: Can you send me the updated client list?
questions.explanation: Đáp án B chấp nhận yêu cầu và hứa gửi ngay.

questions.text: What time does the training session start?
questions.explanation: Câu hỏi "What time" yêu cầu thời gian.

questions.text: Has the shipment arrived yet?
questions.explanation: Đáp án A trả lời về thời gian lô hàng đến.

questions.text: Why was the meeting postponed?
questions.explanation: Câu hỏi "Why" yêu cầu lý do. Đáp án B đưa ra nguyên nhân.

questions.text: Do you know when the office closes today?
questions.explanation: Đáp án A cho biết giờ đóng cửa.

questions.text: Which department should handle this complaint?
questions.explanation: Câu hỏi "Which department" yêu cầu bộ phận. Đáp án B nêu rõ.

questions.text: Are there any vacancies for a sales associate?
questions.explanation: Đáp án B trả lời trực tiếp "yes" và cho biết số vị trí trống.

questions.text: How much does the annual subscription cost?
questions.explanation: Câu hỏi "How much" yêu cầu giá tiền.

questions.text: Would you like to attend the workshop?
questions.explanation: Đáp án C chấp nhận lời mời một cách lịch sự.

questions.text: When is the deadline for the proposal?
questions.explanation: Câu hỏi "When" yêu cầu thời hạn.

questions.text: Who approved the purchase order?
questions.explanation: Câu hỏi "Who" yêu cầu người. Đáp án A nêu rõ người phê duyệt.

questions.text: Is there a parking garage near the office?
questions.explanation: Đáp án A xác nhận có bãi đỗ xe và cho biết vị trí.

questions.text: How do I connect to the office Wi-Fi?
questions.explanation: Đáp án B hướng dẫn cách kết nối.

questions.text: What will the new software update include?
questions.explanation: Câu hỏi "What" yêu cầu thông tin. Đáp án A mô tả nội dung cập nhật.

questions.text: Where can I find the supply closet?
questions.explanation: Câu hỏi "Where" yêu cầu nơi chốn.

questions.text: Did you receive the contract revisions?
questions.explanation: Đáp án A xác nhận đã nhận và xem xét.

questions.text: Why was the order canceled?
questions.explanation: Câu hỏi "Why" yêu cầu lý do. Đáp án A đưa ra nguyên nhân.

questions.text: How long is the probationary period?
questions.explanation: Câu hỏi "How long" yêu cầu thời gian. Đáp án B cho biết 3 tháng.

questions.text: Can the vendor deliver by Friday?
questions.explanation: Đáp án B trả lời về khả năng giao hàng.

questions.text: Where did you put the filing cabinet?
questions.explanation: Câu hỏi "Where" yêu cầu nơi đặt tủ hồ sơ.

questions.text: Have the taxes been filed yet?
questions.explanation: Đáp án B xác nhận đã nộp thuế và cho biết thời gian.

questions.text: Who should I contact about the invoice error?
questions.explanation: Đáp án B hướng dẫn liên hệ bộ phận kế toán thanh toán.

sections.title: Part 3: Conversations
sections.description: Listen to a conversation and answer 3 questions.

questions.text: What are the speakers discussing?
questions.explanation:
[Transcript]
Man: Have you seen the new project guidelines? They arrived this morning.
Woman: Yes, I printed them out. There are some significant changes to the timeline.
Man: Really? I thought we were on schedule.
Woman: The client wants to move the launch date up by two weeks.

Họ đang thảo luận về các hướng dẫn dự án mới.

questions.text: What change does the client want?
questions.explanation:
[Transcript]
Man: Have you seen the new project guidelines? They arrived this morning.
Woman: Yes, I printed them out. There are some significant changes to the timeline.
Man: Really? I thought we were on schedule.
Woman: The client wants to move the launch date up by two weeks.

Khách hàng muốn đẩy ngày ra mắt lên sớm hơn hai tuần.

questions.text: How does the man initially react?
options: A. He is excited about the changes.
B. He is surprised by the news.
C. He already knew about it.
D. He is angry at the client.
questions.explanation:
[Transcript]
Man: Have you seen the new project guidelines? They arrived this morning.
Woman: Yes, I printed them out. There are some significant changes to the timeline.
Man: Really? I thought we were on schedule.
Woman: The client wants to move the launch date up by two weeks.

Người đàn ông tỏ ra ngạc nhiên vì nghĩ rằng dự án đang đúng tiến độ.

questions.text: What is the man's purpose?
options: A. To check in at the hotel
C. To reserve a conference room
questions.explanation:
[Transcript]
Woman: Good morning, this is Greenfield Hotel. How may I help you?
Man: I'd like to book a conference room for next Thursday, please.
Woman: For how many people?
Man: About thirty. We also need a projector and a microphone.

Người đàn ông muốn đặt phòng hội nghị.

questions.text: What equipment does the man need?
options: D. A coffee machine and cups
questions.explanation:
[Transcript]
Woman: Good morning, this is Greenfield Hotel. How may I help you?
Man: I'd like to book a conference room for next Thursday, please.
Woman: For how many people?
Man: About thirty. We also need a projector and a microphone.

Ông ấy cần máy chiếu và micro.

questions.text: How many people will attend?
questions.explanation:
[Transcript]
Woman: Good morning, this is Greenfield Hotel. How may I help you?
Man: I'd like to book a conference room for next Thursday, please.
Woman: For how many people?
Man: About thirty. We also need a projector and a microphone.

Ông ấy nói có khoảng ba mươi người.

questions.text: What is the man calling about?
questions.explanation:
[Transcript]
Man: Hi, I'm calling about my order number 5520. It was supposed to arrive yesterday.
Woman: Let me look that up for you. It seems there was a delay at the shipping facility.
Man: I need it by tomorrow. Can you expedite the delivery?
Woman: I'll see what I can do. Can you hold for a moment?

Ông ấy gọi về việc giao hàng bị trễ.

questions.text: Why was the order delayed?
options: A. The item was out of stock.
B. There was a shipping facility delay.
C. The man entered the wrong address.
D. The courier lost the package.
questions.explanation:
[Transcript]
Man: Hi, I'm calling about my order number 5520. It was supposed to arrive yesterday.
Woman: Let me look that up for you. It seems there was a delay at the shipping facility.

Woman: I'll see what I can do. Can you hold for a moment?

options: A. Provide his credit card number

questions.text: Where can the woman find the figures?
options: A. In the Finance folder on the shared drive
questions.explanation:
[Transcript]
Woman: Do you have the sales figures for last quarter?
Man: Yes, they are in the shared drive under the Finance folder.
Woman: Great. I need to include them in my presentation for the board meeting.
Man: The numbers look good. Revenue is up twelve percent.

Số liệu nằm trong thư mục Finance trên ổ đĩa chung.

[Transcript]

Man: Yes, they are in the shared drive under the Finance folder.
Woman: Great. I need to include them in my presentation for the board meeting.
Man: The numbers look good. Revenue is up twelve percent.

options: B. To prepare for a board meeting

questions.text: What is the problem?
options: B. The paycheck is missing overtime hours.
D. The man did not work this week.
questions.explanation:
[Transcript]
Man: Excuse me, I think there's a mistake on my paycheck.
Woman: What seems to be the problem?
Man: I was paid for forty hours, but I worked fifty this week.
Woman: I'll have to check with the payroll department. Can you submit a timesheet correction form?

Phiếu lương thiếu giờ làm thêm.

questions.text: How many hours did the man actually work?
questions.explanation:

Woman: What seems to be the problem?

Woman: I'll have to check with the payroll department. Can you submit a timesheet correction form?

Ông ấy đã làm việc 50 giờ.

questions.text: What does the woman ask the man to do?
options: B. Submit a timesheet correction form

questions.text: What is the purpose of this conversation?
questions.explanation:
[Transcript]
Woman: Welcome to the interview. Please have a seat.
Man: Thank you. I'm very excited about this opportunity.
Woman: Let's start. Tell me about your previous experience in project management.
Man: I managed a team of ten people for three years at my last company.

Đây là một cuộc phỏng vấn việc làm.

questions.text: How long did the man manage a team?
questions.explanation:

Man: Thank you. I'm very excited about this opportunity.
Woman: Let's start. Tell me about your previous experience in project management.
Man: I managed a team of ten people for three years at my last company.

Ông ấy quản lý đội nhóm trong ba năm.

questions.text: Why does the man want to return the printer?
options: B. It is not working properly.
C. He found a better one.
D. He does not need it anymore.
questions.explanation:
[Transcript]
Man: Hi, I need to return this printer. It's been malfunctioning since I bought it.
Woman: I'm sorry to hear that. Do you have the receipt?
Man: Yes, here it is. I purchased it last week.
Woman: I can offer you a replacement or a full refund. Which would you prefer?

Máy in gặp sự cố từ khi mua.

questions.text: What does the woman offer?
options: A. A discount on a new purchase
C. A replacement or full refund

Woman: Have you finished the budget proposal for next year?
Man: Almost. I'm still working on the research and development section.
Woman: The deadline is Friday. Can you have it done by then?
Man: Yes, I just need to verify the numbers with the accounting team.

Ông ấy đang làm bản đề xuất ngân sách.

questions.text: When is the deadline?

questions.text: What type of room was reserved?
questions.explanation:
[Transcript]
Man: Good afternoon, I have a reservation under the name Martinez.
Woman: Welcome, Mr. Martinez. We have you in a deluxe suite on the eighth floor.
Man: Wonderful. Is the gym open late tonight?
Woman: Yes, the fitness center is open until midnight.

Phòng đặt là phòng hạng sang (deluxe suite).

questions.text: What floor is the room on?

questions.text: What is the company planning?
questions.explanation:
[Transcript]
Woman: I heard the company is planning to expand overseas.
Man: Yes, the CEO announced it at the all-hands meeting.
Woman: Will there be positions available for employees to transfer?
Man: They said internal candidates will get priority.

Công ty đang lên kế hoạch mở rộng ra nước ngoài.

questions.text: Who will have priority for transfer positions?

questions.text: What is being set up?
questions.explanation:
[Transcript]
Man: Could you help me set up the conference room for the 3 o'clock meeting?
Woman: Sure. How many attendees are expected?
Man: About fifteen. We'll need a projector screen and some water bottles.
Woman: I'll also set up name tags and notepads at each seat.

sections.title: Part 4: Short Talks
sections.description: Listen to a short talk and answer questions.

questions.text: When will the picnic be held?
questions.explanation:
[Transcript]
Good morning, everyone. I'd like to remind you that the annual company picnic will be held this Saturday at Riverside Park. Activities will begin at 10 AM and include a barbecue, games, and a raffle. Please bring your families. We look forward to seeing you there.

Đi dã ngoại sẽ được tổ chức vào thứ Bảy này.

questions.text: What activity is NOT mentioned?
questions.explanation:

Good morning, everyone. I'd like to remind you that the annual company picnic will be held this Saturday at Riverside Park. Activities will begin at 10 AM and include a barbecue, games, and a raffle. Please bring your families. We look forward to seeing you there.

questions.text: When is the office open?
options: B. Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM

questions.text: The meeting was rescheduled _____ a conflict with the director's calendar.

questions.text: Please ensure that all equipment is _____ maintained and inspected regularly.

questions.text: The conference room on the fifth floor is _____ for private meetings only.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc bị động: is + V3 (reserved).

questions.text: If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to _____ us.

questions.explanation: Cấu trúc bị động: were + V3 (received).

questions.explanation: Tính từ "competitive"修饰名词 "benefits".

questions.text: The CEO will _____ step down at the end of this fiscal year.
questions.explanation: Trạng từ "formally"修饰 động từ "step down".

questions.explanation: "Policy" = chính sách, quy định.

questions.text: We need to _____ the budget before we can proceed with the project.
questions.explanation: Động từ nguyên形 sau "need to".

questions.text: The supplier was unable to _____ the order on time.
questions.explanation: Động từ nguyên形 sau "was unable to".

questions.text: The office is equipped with state-of-the-art _____ to ensure a comfortable working environment.
questions.explanation: "Facilities" = cơ sở vật chất.

questions.text: Due to budget constraints, the project was _____ to a smaller team.
questions.explanation: Cấu trúc bị động: was + V3 (assigned).

questions.text: The employee handbook contains _____ information about company procedures.

questions.text: _____ submitting your application, please attach your résumé and cover letter.
